scripts.start: npm run ensure:interfaces && node -v && cross-env NODE_ENV=dev nest start -c nest-cli.dev.json -p tsconfig.json
scripts.start:dev: npm run ensure:interfaces && node -v && cross-env NODE_ENV=dev nest start -c nest-cli.dev.json -p tsconfig.json --watch
scripts.start:debug: npm run ensure:interfaces && nest start -c nest-cli.dev.json -p tsconfig.json --debug --watch
scripts.start:test: npm run ensure:interfaces && node -v && cross-env NODE_ENV=test node dist/src/main --watch
scripts.start:prod: npm run ensure:interfaces && node -v && cross-env NODE_ENV=prod node dist/src/main --watch
scripts.start:init: npm run ensure:interfaces && node -v && cross-env NODE_ENV=dev nest start -c nest-cli.init.json -p tsconfig.json
scripts.start:init_test: npm run ensure:interfaces && node -v && cross-env NODE_ENV=test nest start -c nest-cli.init.json -p tsconfig.json
scripts.start:init_prod: npm run ensure:interfaces && node -v && cross-env NODE_ENV=prod nest start -c nest-cli.init.json -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test:debug: npm run ensure:interfaces && node --inspect-brk -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ts-node/register ../node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand
